candidates.why: Explicit total revenue line; matches top-line and equals Net sales in preview.
Not revenue; this is COGS, so not appropriate for REVT.
Operating expense, not revenue.
Direct top-line sales/revenue line; semantically very strong and equals Total Revenue in preview.
Ancillary operating income, not total revenue.

variables.notes: Using revenue priority list: prefer the direct sales line, with Total Revenue as fallback for years/filings where labeling changes.

candidates.why: Direct COGS line and best semantic match.

candidates.row_label: Cost of Goods and Services Sold
candidates.why: Also a valid direct-cost line, but appears only for some years and overlaps with other COGS labels.
Explicit combined cost of revenues/COGS label; valid fallback but overlaps with Cost of goods sold.

variables.notes: Selected the clearest direct-cost line and kept final choice minimal to avoid duplicate/overlapping COGS labels.

candidates.why: Explicit SG&A row; per rule, when a populated explicit SG&A row exists, select only that row.
Could be an SG&A component, but explicit SG&A row already exists and should be preferred alone.
Amortization should be excluded from XSGA components.
Possible overhead bucket, but explicit SG&A row exists so not needed.
Overhead-related but vague and likely residual; inferior to explicit SG&A.
Depreciation should be excluded from XSGA components.
Explicit SG&A wording, but preview is empty while another explicit SG&A row is populated.

variables.notes: Explicit SG&A row is present and populated, so selected only that row per hierarchy. Excluded depreciation/amortization rows and broader overhead buckets.

candidates.why: Direct R&D expense line and populated in 2025 as well as prior years.
R&D-related D&A, not the core R&D expense line.
Direct R&D expense label used in prior years; good fallback.

variables.notes: Using R&D priority list across label changes; excluded depreciation/amortization in R&D.

candidates.why: Broad finance-cost line; usable fallback if no direct interest expense is available, but includes non-interest items.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest-related but too narrow to represent total interest expense.
Direct interest expense line; best match.
Finance-related but not specifically interest expense.
Direct interest expense label, though empty in preview; good fallback if used in other years.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest line; too narrow for total interest expense.

variables.notes: Priority list favors direct interest expense labels; broad Financial expenses included only as last resort if no direct interest line is available.

candidates.row_label: Capital and reserves attributable to parent company shareholders
candidates.why: Preferred parent-only equity line, excluding non-controlling interests.
Valid equity total, but includes non-controlling interests and is therefore less preferred for BE.

final_choice.row_label: Capital and reserves attributable to parent company shareholders

variables.notes: Selected parent-attributable equity to avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.row_label: Non-controlling interests Earnings per share regarding profit attributable to parent company shareholders
candidates.why: Income statement / EPS-related, not balance sheet minority equity.
Income statement attribution of earnings, not the balance sheet minority equity stock.
Direct balance sheet non-controlling interest line; best match.
Equivalent balance sheet minority interest label; good fallback.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Non-controlling interests - Total
candidates.why: Income statement OCI attribution, not balance sheet minority equity.

variables.notes: Using balance sheet NCI labels only; income statement minority-interest rows are period earnings allocations, not minority equity.
